title: Right to all fruits.
doc_html:
SECTION 2--RIGHTS OF THE USUFRUCTUARY

Art. 550.  Right to all fruits.

The usufructuary is entitled to the fruits of the thing subject to usufruct according to the following articles.

Acts 1976, No. 103, §1.
